summary: A clip from a local news segment. A reporter and a uniformed police official sit for a studio interview in front of a large Fairfax County, Virginia seal. The lower-third reads FCPD CHIEF ON WARNINGS ABOUT MURDER SUSPECT and later TESTIMONY ON CAPITOL HILL OVER 'SANCTUARY POLICIES', with a CHATTING WITH THE CHIEF title card showing a man and a uniformed officer.

script.scene: A reporter and a uniformed police official sit for a studio interview in front of a Fairfax County, Virginia seal; lower-third reads FCPD CHIEF ON WARNINGS ABOUT MURDER SUSPECT.
A title card reading CHATTING WITH THE CHIEF shows a man and a uniformed officer.
The studio interview continues; lower-third reads TESTIMONY ON CAPITOL HILL OVER SANCTUARY POLICIES.
